full_text:
Yuan Kang (Zhongzhen) 苑康 (仲真)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Kang (苑康), styledZhongzhen (仲真), was born in Bohai. One of the Eight Paragons of Jiangxia.
